title: Act
description: A thematic block of vignettes within a Season. Per docs/04_Game_Design.md acts are exactly Morning, Midday, Afternoon, Evening in that order.

vignettes.description: Vignette references in playback order. Per the PRD, full Seasons have 15-25 vignettes across all four acts; production validation of the per-Season minimum is enforced at the Season level once Season 1 is written. During M0/M1 individual acts may be empty so the rails can be exercised before content lands.
